title: Wednesday Evening Oct 29 - Exam 2 (Remotely Proctored)
description:
Exam 2:

As on the first exam, students must be registered on and use UCB Wireless for network connection (NOT UCB Guest or Eduroam or the new CU Secure WiFi).

ALL HONOR CODE POLICIES IN FULL EFFECT.

All cell phones must be turned off / powered down (not just silenced) to maximize existing WiFi bandwidth.

Name and section on both exam packet and scantron sheet (and bubbled - Section: left justified - 3 numbers). In Pencil.

Open Canvas in Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge Browsers only.

Blank Excel shell opened only.

No other material in permitted.

Any other windows/apps open will be flagged by Proctorio and considered Academic dishonesty = University implications.

Proctorio set to take and record screen shots each time screen changes.

Proctorio also set to video record each person's activity, including keystroke sequencing

Ok to do work /write-on exam packet.

Answers bubbled on Scantron in pencil

When finished with exam, logoff & shutdown computer.

Turn in scantron and Exam packet.

 YOU WILL NOT BE ABLE TO SECURE WORK IN FINANCE OR ACCOUNTING if hit with Academic Dishonesty / Honor Code Violation.

6480c79c68b4f8c0504c849cdf53828a123236
